v2.6.2 Manual QA Index

This section tests the visual behavior changes in branch v2.6.2.

Instructions

  1. Test first with “Publisher font sizes” Off.
  2. Then enable “Publisher font sizes” On.
  3. Reopen or reflow if required by current app behavior.
  4. Compare the marked sections.
  5. Test on emulator and real 3DS.

Test Sections

  • Publisher font-size policy
  • Small and Big Tags
  • Heading Size Restoration
  • Horizontal Rule Styling
  • Cache Toggle Test
  • Large Opening Stress Chapter
